title: Mike Goes on Hike
desc: Become a real tourist in Mike Goes on Hike! Amazing wild landscapes, inexpressible atmosphere of hiking and important vital lessons are waiting for you. Go all the way to the end to fulfill the request of your beloved grandfather.

title: Modern Naval Warfare
desc: Modern Naval Warfare is the next generation naval combat simulator, which will immerse you in the dark and unforgiving world of the modern high-tech naval battlefield.

title: The Dead Await
desc: Build your deck and try to survive in The Dead Await, a deck-building RPG set during a zombie apocalypse. As one of many survivors, set out across the desolate world, discover the truth about the outbreak, and rebuild human civilization - or die trying.

title: Corsairs: Battle of the Caribbean
desc: An immersive adventure and strategy game set amidst the thrilling world of buccaneering. As a shrewd captain, navigate tumultuous seas, engage in complex politics, and manage a diverse crew to establish maritime dominance and ensure your fleet's future.

title: WorldShaper Idle
desc: A tile-based world-building idle game. Place forests, rocks, mystical flowers and much more. Discover new tiles by experimenting with their placement. Then try to use their bonuses to optimize your production, or just sit back and become more powerful! What will your world look like?

title: Parsector
desc: In Parsector, you play the role of a starship captain at the outer rim of the galaxy. Begin the game in your own fighter ship, accept missions, mine space metal, and build your way up to a capital flagship while you dodge Imperial blockade drones & avoid the Starshadow Guild's harvester crews.

title: Midnight Escape
desc: A weekend getaway turns into a desperate fight for survival. In Midnight Escape, team up with 3 friends to explore a terrifying villa while hunted by a relentless creature. You must find clues, solve intricate puzzles, and find one of the multiple escape routes before the night claims you all.

title: Crush the Rebellion!
desc: The galactic empire is under siege from the rebel scum in all directions! Fight through endless waves of rebel ships using all of the weapons and resources at your disposal as you execute your sole orders: to Crush The Rebellion!

title: It Reaches
desc: It Reaches is a first person horror game, captured through the lens of a police officer’s body cam. Trapped inside the facilities of an abandoned hospital, find a way to escape the horrors lurking underground. Uncover a dark mystery left behind and don't get caught! They will reach for you…

title: Thrifty Business
desc: Run your very own thrift shop in this laid-back management sim! Sort through boxes to find hidden treasures and arrange nostalgic displays of clothes, antiques, toys & more. Befriend the regulars, help with their requests and expand your store into a hub for the local community!

title: Re:Blade
desc: Re:Blade is a cursor-driven action roguelike with incremental progression. Control your positioning while attacks fire automatically, shape your build through Awakenings, and face sudden boss invasions.

title: Game.exe 2: Phantom Strike
desc: You find an old computer with a forgotten program installed: Phantom Strike. A single server is still online, frozen in time and waiting for someone to finish the match. What begins as nostalgic curiosity becomes a descent into something far stranger.

title: Dwarf Eats Mountain
desc: Dwarves hunger for gold, and no mountain shall stand in their way! Mine riches, unearth artifacts, and upgrade your dwarves to devour ever-bigger peaks in this whimsical incremental game.

title: Shikhondo: Blue Pieta
desc: Once more, the hunt for Youkai begins! Across the ocean in a city far, far away, the side-scrolling shoot 'em up action of our two protagonists unfolds! Complete the Pietà of struggle that burns blue with its raging barrage!

title: Add Flyers To Dreams
desc: Would you like to run ads in dreams? “ADD FLYERS TO DREAMS” is a flappy roguelike game where you fly around inside dreams, inject ads, stack up contracts, and earn cookies.

title: At Night: Haunted Ride
desc: The grand opening of the Haunted Mine Ride is tomorrow. Tonight, you run the final test rides. Ride the minecart, Fix props, repeat rides and don’t make "them" notice you.

title: Frostland
desc: Click, collect, build and craft. Frostland is a cozy 2D clicker game set in a snowy valley. Process resources and forge powerful tools to help Pitty, the wizard dog, on his journey to obtain the legendary staff.

title: I Want You To Notice Me: His Story
desc:
It's Spot the Differences game.…. until someone changes how you see everything

I Want You To Notice Me is a short 5-minute but charming spot-the-difference game that’s a little more meaningful than it first appears.

The rules aren’t always what you expect.
Sometimes they change—depending on the situation… and the feelings behind it.

But don’t worry.
Just relax, take your time, and enjoy the story.

title: Hardware Tycoon
desc:
Take the helm of your own technology company in Hardware Tycoon.

Start your journey in 1986 and lead your enterprise through four decades of innovation to 2026. This game is about shaping the future of computing. Design the brains of tomorrow's devices, outsmart ruthless competitors, and build a legacy that lasts.

Dive deep into the heart of silicon. Decide on core counts, clock speeds, cache sizes, and thermals. Balance raw performance against power efficiency and cost to create the perfect processor for every market segment. Every design choice impacts benchmarks, reviews, and your bottom line.

title: Slither Whip
desc: No description available

title: Treasure Tides
desc: No description available

title: Wouldst Thou Have Some Tea?
desc: No description available
